title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic and OpenAI have issued warnings about AI systems like Claude increasingly participating in their own development through code writing, experimentation, and research. The concern centers on AI self-improvement dynamics where AI systems are handling more of the work toward building better AI, with humans directing goals but AI executing implementation.
